release_notes: Raised hull depth to 200 mm (D/L=0.31) 2026-05-16 per chang reference; zither pegs; slip-cast finial; keel soundport. G3 to E5 diatonic.

harness: low-back positioning belt with stern tether
release_notes: Scaled-up family member; depth D/L=0.33; ~2.7 octaves D3 to G5; weight begins to want a belt.
Chang-proportioned (D/L=0.40); bow-end soundboard rose instead of keel-port; two multi-strip inlay bands; ~3.5 octaves A2 to A5; standing play requires harness; pickup recommended.
Same as SAM-13-ROOT with under-strip piezo + 1/4-inch output jack hidden in stern stub.
Reduced-tension validation build for neck-joint and soundboard testing before full schedule.
